pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21 to align with the migration target.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features and potentially causing compatibility issues with Java 21-specific APIs or runtime behaviors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate JAXB API dependency from javax.xml.bind to jakarta.xml.bind to comply with Jakarta EE namespace changes.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.xml.bind package was removed from the JDK in Java 11 and subsequent versions; using the old groupId/artifactId may lead to missing class errors or conflicts with Jakarta EE standards in modern environments.
